scripts.build:rich-text-editor:release: tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false && terser NTComponents/Editors/NTRichTextEditor.razor.js --module --compress --comments false --output NTComponents/Editors/NTRichTextEditor.razor.js && terser NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolImageButton.razor.js --module --compress --comments false --output NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolImageButton.razor.js && terser NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolTableButton.razor.js --module --compress --comments false --output NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolTableButton.razor.js && terser NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolTextColorButton.razor.js --module --compress --comments false --output NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolTextColorButton.razor.js && terser NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolLinkButton.razor.js --module --compress --comments false --output NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolLinkButton.razor.js && terser NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolIframeButton.razor.js --module --compress --comments false --output NTComponents/Editors/Tool/EditorToolIframeButton.razor.js
